profile.name: Amit Kumar Shaw
profile.headline: Assistant Accountant | Meta Ads | SEO | Web Developer
profile.subheadline: Multi-skilled professional helping businesses grow financially and digitally
profile.aboutHtml:
I am a motivated and detail-oriented professional with practical experience in Tally Prime, vendor ledger handling, purchase entries, pharmacy billing operations, and day-to-day business record support.

I combine accounting discipline with a strong interest in digital tools, web technology, and business growth.

Accounting.label: Accounting
Accounting.description: Ledger accuracy, billing discipline, and dependable financial workflow support.

Digital Marketing.label: Digital Marketing
Digital Marketing.description: Practical campaign thinking for Meta Ads, visibility, and SEO-oriented content structure.

Technical.label: Technical
Technical.description: Responsive websites, productivity systems, and AI-assisted execution for faster outcomes.

hero.description: Practical business support with accounting discipline, digital growth thinking, and hands-on execution.

about.title: Professional Summary
about.description: A practical business support profile combining accounting discipline, digital growth awareness, and hands-on execution for real clients.

skills.title: Multi-Skilled Capability Stack
skills.description: Structured across business operations, growth support, and technical execution so the portfolio feels like a complete professional system.

experience.title: Experience That Connects Accuracy With Growth
experience.description: From day-to-day financial handling to practical digital execution, the timeline reflects reliable, adaptable business support.
experience.sideNoteTitle: Process-minded, calm under pressure, and focused on useful outcomes.
experience.sideNoteDescription: The strongest value here is not just skill range, but the ability to connect records, communication, reporting, and digital presentation into one dependable workflow.

projects.title: Execution That Looks Polished And Business-Ready
projects.description: Scroll-aware project storytelling, premium motion, and a draggable slider combine product-style presentation with recruiter-friendly clarity.

achievements.title: Recognition And Learning Milestones
achievements.description: Proof of consistency, curiosity, and the ability to keep growing across business, tools, and execution.

contact.availability: Open for freelance work, business support roles, and growth-focused projects.
contact.title: Ready to support your business with polished execution
contact.description: Reach out for accounting support, portfolio website work, or practical digital growth help. The section styling, title, and support copy can now be updated directly from the admin panel.
contact.emailHint: Best for project discussion and formal communication.
contact.whatsappHint: Fastest way to reach out for freelance or client work.

experiences.description: Working with Tally Prime, vendor ledgers, purchase entry flow, and daily accounting support tasks with a focus on consistency and accuracy.
Handled pharmacy billing operations, cash transactions, and customer-facing billing processes with practical POS familiarity.

projects.title: Hospital Website
projects.description: A real website project created to present healthcare services in a clean, trustworthy, and user-friendly format for local business visibility.

achievements.title: Quiz Competition Recognition
achievements.description: Represented the district in a school-level quiz competition and secured 3rd position.

achievements.title: ADCA Certified
achievements.description: Completed Advanced Diploma in Computer Applications.
